# Hauz360 Design Studio

> Luxury interior design studio creating elegant, functional interiors for homes, offices, modular kitchens and commercial spaces.

Hauz360 Design Studio offers residential, office, commercial and turnkey interior design services with 3D visualization and end-to-end project execution.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of services, portfolio and studio.
- [About](/about): Studio story, vision, mission and values.
- [Services](/services): Residential, modular kitchen, office, commercial, 3D and turnkey services.
- [Projects](/projects): Portfolio of recent interior design projects.
- [Process](/process): Seven-step design process from consultation to handover.
- [Gallery](/gallery): Visual gallery of interior work.
- [Testimonials](/testimonials): Client reviews.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch and book a free consultation.
